rules.name: frontend-must-use-openapi-client
rules.description: Frontend cannot call API endpoints directly. All calls must use the generated OpenAPI client.

rules.name: ui-cannot-access-api-directly
rules.description: UI components must call services, not the generated API client directly.

rules.name: services-layer-required
rules.description: All API operations must go through service layer abstraction.

rules.name: api-contract-cannot-be-broken
rules.description: Backend changes cannot break the OpenAPI contract.

rules.name: manifest-must-match-openapi
rules.description: All endpoints in manifest must exist in OpenAPI.

rules.name: admin-routes-require-auth
rules.description: All /admin routes must require JWT authorization.

rules.name: public-creator-identity-is-username
rules.description: Public-facing creator identity must use DisplayName, never email. The 'artist' and 'creatorUsername' fields on TrackResponse must be populated from ApplicationUser.DisplayName.

rules.name: duplicate-upload-prevention
rules.description: The same creator cannot upload the same audio file twice. Enforced via SHA-256 hash scoped per creator.
